assertions.description: All 13 components are correctly identified: J1 (Conn_01x06_Socket), J2 and J3 (70AAJ-4-M0 Bourns modular contacts with correct Mouser PN 652-70AAJ-4-M0), and 10 test points (TP1-TP10) all with in_bom=true as specified in the schematic instances. The single no-connect at J1 is correctly counted. Power rails +3.3V, +5V, GND, and PWR_FLAG are correctly identified.

The design_analysis.bus_analysis.uart correctly identifies TX and RX nets as UART signals with pin_count=3 (test point, connector pin, and a second connector pin each), reflecting the breakout nature of this programmer board.
